sections.heading: Cash Management
sections.summary: Cash management covers recording cash receipts, reconciling drawers, and preparing safe deposits at the end of each day.
steps: Count the cash drawer at opening and closing.
Record cash receipts against the correct shift and invoice.
Reconcile any variance before closing the day.

sections.heading: Adding New Item
sections.summary: Always search the catalogue first. If the item is not available, add it through the app or purchase flow with barcode, photos, GST, HSN, and shelf-life details.
